title: Matera named one of the top fast-growing companies in Brazil
excerpt: Among the top 101 companies, FinTech Energy highlights Matera as one of the top fast-growing businesses emerging in Brazil and beyond.
body: Among the top 101 companies, FinTech Energy highlights Matera as one of the top fast-growing businesses emerging in Brazil and beyond. [Read here.](https://fintech.energy/brazils-101-fastest-growing-fintech-startups/)
